content.text:
All 7 active tests pass with 1 todo remaining.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: No new code was needed. The existing implementation in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_11-51-02_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.ts` already correctly handles overpopulation through the generic `survives` function (`liveNeighbors === 3 || (isAlive && liveNeighbors === 2)`).
**Result**: All tests now pass (7 passing, 1 todo)
**Approach**: The minimal implementation from previous Green phases (full Game of Life rules via `survives`) is already general enough to satisfy this overpopulation test - the center cell of a full 3x3 has 8 live neighbors, which fails both survival conditions (not equal to 3, and not 2 for a live cell).

Proceeding to Refactor phase.

- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_11-51-02_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/game-of-life.ts
